fields.localRole: Strict Apple continuation URL for this exact collection. The caller must repeat every originating list control, including the effective/default limit, filters, sort, include, fields, and nested limits when supported; the exact query and a non-empty cursor are validated before sending the continuation request.

tools.note: Partial because the public projection intentionally exposes only a subset of current App attributes and collection query controls. count is the current page size; totalCount uses Apple paging.total, falls back to count only on a terminal page, and is null when Apple omits total while another page exists.

tools.note: The exact-name and exact-bundle-ID union branches each follow all Apple pages with fixed limit=200, sparse App projection, and deterministic sort. Every continuation must preserve its branch filter and fixed controls, allow only Apple's cursor, and remain on the configured origin and collection path. Repeated or invalid next URLs fail without returning partial results. Resources are de-duplicated by App ID and sorted locally by name, bundle ID, SKU, then ID.

tools.note: The handler validates app-to-version ownership and requires the filter to resolve exactly one resource whose type, locale attribute, and version linkage all match before PATCH. It preserves omitted versus explicit-null localization attributes, then patches the resolved localization.
